creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
The BEST NYC Boat Cruise for $4.50 

*Details are pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #travel #boat #cruise

transcription.text: Did you know that you can take a $5 boat cruise down the entire east side of Manhattan where you'll see the Queensborough Bridge, Roosevelt Island, Empire State, Chrysler Building, the Manhattan and Brooklyn Bridge, Lady Liberty, and all of Lower Manhattan? This is the New York City Ferry from East 90th down to Wall Street.
